stories.title: Norris Wins Miami Sprint in McLaren 1-2 — Antonelli Hit With Penalty, Drops to P6

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
NORRIS WINS. McLAREN 1-2 IN MIAMI SPRINT.

Piastri right behind him. Leclerc P3. Antonelli gets a 5-second penalty for track limits — drops to P6.

First McLaren win of 2026. The upgrade WORKS. #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Bortoleto (Audi) DISQUALIFIED from Miami Sprint P11 — engine technical infringement.

Meanwhile Norris's McLaren was the class of the field. Piastri P2. Leclerc P3.

McLaren won Miami in 2024 and 2025. Now a sprint title too? #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP

article.headline: Norris Wins Miami Sprint in McLaren 1-2 as Antonelli Hit With Penalty and Drops to P6

stories.title: Qualifying: Antonelli Poles Miami GP — Verstappen P2, Leclerc P3, Norris P4

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
ANTONELLI ON POLE. Miami GP qualifying:

P1 Antonelli 1:27.798
P2 Verstappen +0.166s
P3 Leclerc +0.345s
P4 Norris +0.385s
P5 Russell +0.399s

Championship leader starts from the front. Race starts 1 PM ET. #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Antonelli took sprint humiliation (penalty, P6) — then went straight back out and put it on POLE.

That's the mindset of a championship leader.

Verstappen P2 — best qualifying of his difficult 2026. Race: 1 PM ET. #F1Fanrecap

article.headline: Antonelli Takes Miami GP Pole as Verstappen Lines Up Second and Leclerc Third

stories.title: Miami GP Today — Race Moved to 1 PM ET Due to Thunderstorm Threat

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Miami GP STARTS AT 1 PM ET TODAY.

Race moved up 3 hours to beat the thunderstorms. 57 laps. Championship on the line.

Antonelli on pole. Verstappen P2. Leclerc P3. Norris P4.

Don't miss it. #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
MIAMI GP RACE DAY REMINDER:

🏁 Start: 1 PM ET (moved due to storms)
🏆 Pole: Antonelli (Mercedes)
📺 Live on Apple TV+ / ESPN

57 laps around the Miami International Autodrome. Who wins? #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP

article.headline: Miami GP Race Day: Start Moved to 1 PM ET to Beat Thunderstorms — Antonelli on Pole, McLaren Lurking

stories.title: Championship Update: Antonelli Leads Russell by 7 Points Heading Into Miami Race

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Championship standings heading into the Miami GP:

1. Antonelli — leads Russell by SEVEN points (was 9 before sprint penalty)
3. Leclerc — 55 pts

McLaren just won the sprint. The title fight is NOT over. #F1Fanrecap

article.headline: F1 Championship Standings: Antonelli Leads Russell by 7 Points as McLaren Hunts Heading Into Miami Race

stories.title: McLaren's Sprint 1-2 Sends Warning Shot — Norris and Piastri Ready to Hunt

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
McLaren brought an entirely new MCL40 to Miami — new floor, bodywork, rear wing, brake ducts.

Result: Sprint 1-2. Norris P4 on the grid.

Stella called it a "completely new car." It clearly is. Is the title fight about to get messier? #F1Fanrecap

article.headline: McLaren's Sprint 1-2 Sends Warning to Mercedes: The Title Fight Is No Longer a Two-Team Story
